directive.title: Supabase database initialization and core tables

auditor.summary: The build provides a solid foundation with proper Supabase client setup, TypeScript types, and well-structured migrations for users and rfqs tables with RLS policies. However, three critical files are missing due to output truncation: the audit_logs migration, indexes migration, and audit trigger implementation. These omissions directly violate acceptance criteria 4, 5, 7, and 10. Additionally, existing migrations lack rollback support. The build is recoverable but requires completion of the missing components before it can be considered production-ready.

top_issues.description: Audit logs migration file is completely missing from generated code. This is a core requirement for audit trail completeness and data lineage.
Indexes migration file is completely missing. Required indexes on rfqs.status, rfqs.created_at, audit_logs.timestamp, audit_logs.entity_type are not created.
Audit logging function/trigger file is completely missing. No audit trigger is created on rfqs table changes.

log: [2026-05-14T20:58:05.433Z] Processing: AUTO-009 — Supabase database initialization and core tables
